rationale: This skill is primarily an analytical/conversational workflow: it reads the project's CONTEXT.md, ADRs under docs/adr/, and explores the codebase broadly via a sub-agent to identify shallow modules. Writes are limited to lazily creating/updating CONTEXT.md when new domain terms emerge and optionally appending new ADRs under docs/adr/ when a candidate is rejected with a load-bearing reason. No network calls or subprocess invocations are implied — exploration is via the Explore sub-agent and file reads, and no external tools, package managers, or APIs are referenced.
